title: Zig FFI exports + Rust FFI bindings
description:
Extend the FFI layer with all Phase 3 Zig kernel exports and corresponding Rust bindings.

Zig side — extend zig/src/ffi/exports.zig with:
- syn_rmsnorm_forward, syn_silu, syn_swiglu
- syn_quantize_per_channel_int8, syn_dequantize_per_channel_int8, syn_qgemm_int8
- syn_kvcache_create, syn_kvcache_append, syn_kvcache_slice, syn_kvcache_reset

All follow existing FFI patterns: opaque handles, status codes, null-safety.

C header — update synapse/synapse.h with new declarations.

Rust side:
- Extend crates/synapse-sys/src/lib.rs with extern declarations
- Add safe Rust wrappers in synapse-core for each new operation

Tests (mandatory):
- FFI round-trip: Rust tensors → call each FFI function → verify results
- Error propagation: null pointers, shape mismatches → proper error codes
- No panics across FFI boundary (test with invalid inputs)
- No memory leaks in 10K create/call/destroy cycles

Pass/fail:
- All FFI functions callable from Rust
- No panics across FFI boundary
- No memory leaks
- Error codes correctly map to Result::Err in Rust
